resources.string: Choose the smarter product, not just the cheaper one.
This app helps users compare two products by calculating which option gives a better price per volume. It is useful for detergent, drinks, refill packs, and other daily shopping decisions.
Fill in the product name, price, and amount first. Units now support weight, volume, and piece-based items.
Optional, but helpful for the final recommendation.
Examples: 800, 1.2, or 12 depending on the selected unit
Press the compare button to see the result.
Fill in both product prices and amounts to see the comparison result.
Choose units from the same category so the products can be compared fairly.
Use valid numbers greater than zero so the calculation can be processed.
Both products give the same value.
Enter a valid price greater than 0.
Enter a valid amount greater than 0.
